description: Add Chapter 3 (Proses Polimerisasi dan Sintesis Polimer) covering addition polymerization (cationic, anionic, free radical), condensation polymerization, synthesis techniques, and characterization methods.
steps: Write Section 3.1 Polimerisasi Adisi (Addition Polymerization): mechanism overview, then subsections for 3.1.1 Polimerisasi Kationik (cationic initiation, Lewis acid catalysts, mechanism steps, examples), 3.1.2 Polimerisasi Anionik (anionic initiation, living polymerization, block copolymers), 3.1.3 Polimerisasi Radikal Bebas (initiation-propagation-termination, initiators like AIBN/BPO, kinetics, chain transfer)

Write Section 3.2 Polimerisasi Kondensasi (Condensation Polymerization): step-growth mechanism, Carothers equation, examples (polyesters, polyamides, polyurethanes, polycarbonates), molecular weight distribution

Write Section 3.3 Teknik Sintesis Polimer (Polymer Synthesis Techniques): bulk polymerization, solution polymerization, suspension polymerization, emulsion polymerization - conditions, advantages, disadvantages, industrial applications

Write Section 3.4 Karakterisasi Polimer (Polymer Characterization): GPC/SEC for molecular weight, DSC for thermal transitions, TGA for thermal stability, FTIR for functional groups, NMR for structure, XRD for crystallinity, SEM/TEM for morphology
Write Section 3.5 Rangkuman, 3.6 Latihan Soal (10 questions on mechanisms and techniques), 3.7 Bahan Diskusi (discussion on choosing polymerization methods)
Include detailed reaction mechanisms with proper chemical notation, kinetic equations, and characterization data interpretation
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 3 covers all three types of addition polymerization with detailed mechanisms
Condensation polymerization is explained with Carothers equation and examples
All four synthesis techniques are compared with pros/cons
Characterization methods section covers at least 5 analytical techniques
Reaction mechanisms use proper LaTeX chemical notation
Mathematical equations for kinetics are properly formatted
All content is in Indonesian with proper scientific terminology
verification: Read the file and confirm Chapter 3 sections have detailed mechanistic content
Confirm reaction equations and mathematical formulas are present
findings: Chapter 3 adds 344 lines covering all required content. Contains 20+ equations using equation environment, 90+ chemical formulas using \ce{}, a comparison table of polymerization techniques, 10 exercise questions, and 4 discussion topics. All environments balanced. File now ends with BAB 4 marker.
